steps.title: Identify the key signal in the narrator's description
steps.content: The narrator explicitly states there's nothing funnier than watching gym-goers on stair-steppers and treats the scene as entertainment by naming it The about to Pass Out Show. The key signal is the narrator's amusement.

steps.title: Match the signal to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice C directly states the purpose: describing an activity that the narrator finds amusing.

The other three propose purposes unsupported by the passage:
  • A mistakes the narrator's joke title for an actual movie
  • B introduces an unexpressed purpose about school excitement
  • D invents a problem that doesn't exist
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
